            $wpdb->prepare("SELECT

                    pm.post_id,

                    prid.meta_value AS post_template_identifier,
                    p.post_title, p.post_type,
                    templates.version as should
                FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} pm

                    ON p.ID = pm.post_id

                    ON BINARY templates.identifier = BINARY prid.meta_value
                    AND templates.context = %s
                    AND templates.is_outdated = 0
                    AND templates.type = (
                        CASE
                            WHEN p.post_type = %s THEN %s
                            ELSE %s
                        END
                    )
                WHERE pm.meta_key = %s
                    AND pm.meta_value > 0
                    AND prid.meta_key = %s
                    AND p.post_type IN (%s, %s)
                    AND p.post_status NOT IN ('trash')
                    AND templates.version <> pm.meta_value", TemplateConsumers::getContext(), Cookie::CPT_NAME, StorageHelper::TYPE_SERVICE, StorageHelper::TYPE_BLOCKER, Blocker::META_NAME_PRESET_VERSION, Blocker::META_NAME_PRESET_ID, Blocker::CPT_NAME, Cookie::CPT_NAME)

$wpdb->get_results(
            // phpcs:disable WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL
            $wpdb->prepare("SELECT
                    pm.meta_id AS post_version_meta_id,
                    pm.post_id,
                    pm.meta_value AS post_template_version,
                    prid.meta_value AS post_template_identifier,
                    p.post_title, p.post_type,
                    templates.version as should
                FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} pm
                INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} prid
                    ON prid.post_id = pm.post_id
                INNER JOIN {$wpdb->posts} p
                    ON p.ID = pm.post_id
                INNER JOIN {$table_name} templates
                    ON BINARY templates.identifier = BINARY prid.meta_value
                    AND templates.context = %s
                    AND templates.is_outdated = 0
                    AND templates.type = (
                        CASE
                            WHEN p.post_type = %s THEN %s
                            ELSE %s
                        END
                    )
                WHERE pm.meta_key = %s
                    AND pm.meta_value > 0
                    AND prid.meta_key = %s
                    AND p.post_type IN (%s, %s)
                    AND p.post_status NOT IN ('trash')
                    AND templates.version <> pm.meta_value", TemplateConsumers::getContext(), Cookie::CPT_NAME, StorageHelper::TYPE_SERVICE, StorageHelper::TYPE_BLOCKER, Blocker::META_NAME_PRESET_VERSION, Blocker::META_NAME_PRESET_ID, Blocker::CPT_NAME, Cookie::CPT_NAME)
        )

source.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
            // phpcs:disable WordPress.DB
            $wpdb->prepare("SELECT
                    p.post_type,
                    successors.identifier AS successor,
                    CONCAT(successors.headline, CASE WHEN successors.sub_headline <> '' THEN CONCAT(' (', successors.sub_headline, ')') ELSE '' END) AS successor_name,
                    pm.post_id AS replaces_id,
                    p.post_title AS replaces_title,
                    successors.successor_of_identifiers as successor_json
                FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} pm
                INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} prid
                    ON prid.post_id = pm.post_id
                INNER JOIN {$wpdb->posts} p
                    ON p.ID = pm.post_id
                INNER JOIN {$table_name} successors
                    ON successors.context = %s
                    AND successors.type = (
                        CASE
                            WHEN p.post_type = %s THEN %s
                            ELSE %s
                        END
                    )
                    AND successors.is_outdated = 0
                    AND successors.successor_of_identifiers IS NOT NULL
                WHERE pm.meta_key = %s
                    AND pm.meta_value > 0
                    AND prid.meta_key = %s
                    AND p.post_type IN (%s, %s)
                    AND p.post_status NOT IN ('trash')
                    AND successors.successor_of_identifiers LIKE BINARY CONCAT('%"', prid.meta_value, '"%')", TemplateConsumers::getContext(), Cookie::CPT_NAME, StorageHelper::TYPE_SERVICE, StorageHelper::TYPE_BLOCKER, Blocker::META_NAME_PRESET_VERSION, Blocker::META_NAME_PRESET_ID, Blocker::CPT_NAME, Cookie::CPT_NAME)
        )
